content: Holà, open the calendar tab and look up whether this caldav calendar is displayed in the left side panel. If you don't want tu use it you can unsubscribe (abbestellen) it. Otherwise R-click on the caldav calendar > Properties (Eigenschaften) and fill in calendar name, username, location, email, ....

content:
Try to start Windows 11 in safe mode with networking enabled.

Does the problem go away?

Windows safe mode disables anti-virus software. This is a troubleshooting step, not a solution.

Note, Windows safe also disables WiFi. So you'd need a wired LAN connection for Windows safe mode.
creator: christ1
